problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear

hypothesis: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Optical. Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion directly addresses this.
